MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-02-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN THAT IT IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT OSCAR FERREIRAWALLACE IN THE AMOUNT OF $6,030.02. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF MUST SUBMIT A SEPERATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT IN ADDITION TO A SEPERATE PROPOSED ORDER. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/HEK)

Notice Of And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A.'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Of The Parties

Plaintiff Capital One, N.A.'s motion for entry of judgment pursuant to stipulation of the parties is granted. Plaintiff has shown that it is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Oscar FerreiraWallace in the amount of $6,030.02. No opposition filed.
Plaintiff must submit a separate proposed judgment in addition to a separate proposed order.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
